title: zinnia elegans var. violacea
intro: Zinnia elegans var. violacea, also known as the Purple Zinnia or Violet Zinnia, is a variety of the Zinnia elegans plant, which is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Zinnia elegans var. violacea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a poultice or topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
